category_sources: source_facts.description says Findomain is a cross-platform subdomain enumerator; official GitHub README describes domain recognition, subdomain discovery, monitoring, port scanning, and alerting.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use the display name Findomain.
docs_sources: No separate official docs URL was verified; official GitHub README is the best documentation surface and references Findomain documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Findomain/Findomain; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies subdomain enumeration; official GitHub repository topics/README include DNS, OSINT, bug bounty, subdomains, and domain recognition features.
